creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193278
py-django-configurations-2.0.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn that updates www/py-django-configurations to 2.0

Changes by upstream:
- http://django-configurations.readthedocs.io/en/stable/changes/

Changes to the port:
- changed RUN_DEPENDS to Django v1.11
- changed MASTER_SITES to CHEESESHOP
- added LICENSE
- added DOCS option with the appropriate dependencies


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
